In this episode of Inside Active, host David Cohne, mutual fund and active management analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, speaks with Rebecca Sin, a senior ETF analyst at BI, and Philippe El-Asmar, APAC head of ETFs at JPMorgan Asset Management, about what’s driving adoption across the region. They discuss why Taiwan has emerged

title: Banco CTT Said to Draw Interest from Spain’s Cajamar
title_cn: 据称西班牙 Cajamar 银行对 CTT 银行感兴趣
summary: Spanish lender BCC-Grupo Cooperativo Cajamar has expressed interest in a tie-up with the banking unit of Portuguese postal service operator CTT–Correios de Portugal SA, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Nasdaq 100 Soars as Chipmaker Rebound Overshadows Iran War
title_cn: 芯片制造商反弹掩盖伊朗战争 纳斯达克 100 指数飙升
summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index advanced on Tuesday as a rebound in chipmakers at the center of the artificial-intelligence trade overshadowed the re-escalation in the US-Iran war.

title: Iberdrola Agrees to Buy 80% Stake in Caruna for €2 Billion
title_cn: Iberdrola 同意以 20 亿欧元收购 Caruna 80% 的股份
summary: Iberdrola SA agreed to buy an 80% stake in Finland’s main electricity distribution network Caruna Group for €2 billion ($2.3 billion).

title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商加速反弹，股市上涨：市场总结
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that’s powered the bull market has more room to run.

title: Colombia, Peru Leaders Draw Investors With Policy Signals
title_cn: 哥伦比亚和秘鲁领导人用政策信号吸引投资者
summary: Investors are finding fresh reasons to buy Colombian and Peruvian assets as the countries’ newly elected presidents deliver early signals that their market-friendly agendas will translate into policy overhaul.

title: Liverpool FC Owners Consider Selling Stake to Bhatia-Led Group
title_cn: 利物浦足球俱乐部老板考虑将股份出售给巴蒂亚领导的集团
summary: The owners of Liverpool FC are considering selling a stake in the English Premier League football club to a consortium of investors led by Amit Bhatia.

title: High-Yielding Emerging-Market Currencies Gain, Stocks Rebound
title_cn: 高收益新兴市场货币上涨，股市反弹
summary: Most emerging-market currencies advanced on Tuesday, bolstered by a rebound in risk appetite as investors looked past the latest developments in the Middle East and focused on carry trades instead.

title: US Yields Hit Two-Month High as Oil Sparks Inflation Risk
title_cn: 由于石油引发通胀风险，美国收益率触及两个月高点
summary: US Treasuries fell, pushing 10- and 30-year yields to the highest levels in about two months, as a surge in crude oil prices stoked concern that inflationary pressures will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: Oaktree’s Poli Sees a $200 Billion ‘Distressed Moment’ Coming as Rates Stay High
title_cn: 橡树资本 (Oaktree) 的 Poli 预计，随着利率居高不下，2000 亿美元的“困境时刻”即将到来
summary: Companies with $200 billion in debt face a reckoning as funding costs stay high and debt comes due over the next few years, according to distressed specialist Oaktree Capital Management.

title: Gold and Silver Rise on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Fed Strategy
title_cn: 交易员权衡美联储策略，黄金和白银因逢低买盘而上涨
summary: Gold and silver rose on dip-buying as traders monitored Middle East tensions for signs that higher energy costs could stoke inflation, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to tighten policy.

title: UK Yields Stall Near Two-Month High in Warning for Burnham
title_cn: 英国收益率停滞在两个月高位附近，伯纳姆警告
summary: There’s been no honeymoon in the bond market for the UK’s new Prime Minister Andy Burnham.

title_cn: 维克托（Viktor）猛烈抨击地缘政治对投资者是否重要
summary: Tail risks are growing, but they aren’t everything.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 21
title_cn: 7 月 21 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Brent oil extended its recent rally as traders weighed threats to maritime traffic that span from the Strait of Hormuz and the Red Sea to a key Kazakh export terminal on Russia’s coast.

title: Adobe, Salesforce Downgrades Are Latest Show of AI Fears
title_cn: Adobe、Salesforce 降级是人工智能恐惧的最新表现
summary: Concerns about the impact artificial intelligence will have on software companies have prompted more Wall Street analysts to recommend selling Adobe Inc. and Salesforce Inc. stock than they have in years.

title: SpaceX’s Great Unlocking Begins With $116 Billion Share Release
title_cn: SpaceX 的伟大解锁始于发行 1160 亿美元的股票
summary: SpaceX has set the stage for one of the largest share unlocks in capital markets history, with as much as $116 billion worth of stock becoming eligible for sale for the first time next month.

title: Bitcoin Rallies After Bessent Says Clarity Act at ‘1-Yard Line’
title_cn: Bessent 表示《澄清法案》处于“1 码线”后比特币上涨
summary: Crypto markets are stirring after months of listless trading on signs that Washington is moving toward a clearer rulebook for digital assets.

title: AMC Rolls Out Red Carpet for Debt Investors to Trumpet Rebound
title_cn: AMC为债务投资者铺上红地毯以吹响反弹
summary: Dozens of SUVs descended upon AMC’s Lincoln Square theater in New York Monday for an exclusive screening of The Odyssey. But it wasn’t the typical celebrity crowd streaming out of the cars and onto a red carpet.

title: India’s Refiners Come to the Rescue of Russia’s Oil Exporters
title_cn: 印度炼油厂拯救俄罗斯石油出口商
summary: Deliveries of Russian crude oil to India so far this month remain near June’s record

title: Pakistan Appoints Banks for its Bond and Sukuk Programs
title_cn: 巴基斯坦为其债券和伊斯兰债券计划指定银行
summary: Pakistan’s finance ministry has appointed banks for its global bond and sukuk programs, according to a statement.

title: Oil Tankers Turn Back in Red Sea After Houthi Attack Threat
title_cn: 胡塞武装袭击威胁后油轮在红海掉头
summary: Three oil tankers have made U-turns in the southern Red Sea after warnings from Houthi rebels in Yemen that they would target ships heading to or from Saudi ports.

title: Kalshi Seeks Approval to List Perpetual Futures Tied to Gold
title_cn: Kalshi 寻求批准上市与黄金挂钩的永续期货
summary: Kalshi Inc. is seeking approval to expand precious-metals trading on its platform with a popular type of derivative that never expires for gold, silver and platinum.

title: Nvidia Touts Progress Getting New Rubin Design to Customers
title_cn: Nvidia 向客户宣传新 Rubin 设计的进展
summary: Nvidia Corp., the semiconductor company at the heart of the artificial intelligence boom, said its latest chip designs are making their way to customers and will help solidify the chipmaker’s leadership in the industry.

title: Intel Rallies After Saying It’ll Make More Headcount Reductions
title_cn: 英特尔表示将进一步裁员后股价上涨
summary: Intel Corp. rallied in early trading Tuesday after confirming it’ll cut more jobs to reduce costs and shake up its key data center unit.

title: OpenAI’s Altman to Brief US Officials on Next Wave of AI Models
title_cn: OpenAI 的 Altman 将向美国官员介绍下一波人工智能模型
summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman plans to brief the Trump administration and US lawmakers next week on the upcoming generation of artificial intelligence models as the US works to create a process to review the safety of cutting-edge AI systems, according to a senior company executive.

title: Apple to Launch ‘Upgrade’ Device Leasing Program With Klarna to Spur Sales
title_cn: 苹果将​​与 Klarna 合作推出“升级”设备租赁计划以刺激销售
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce Apple Upgrade, a leasing program that will mark one of the biggest-ever changes to how the company sells devices.

title: China’s Moonshot in Talks on Pre-IPO Funds at $50 Billion Value
title_cn: 中国在价值 500 亿美元的 Pre-IPO 基金谈判中的登月计划
summary: Moonshot AI is preparing to begin discussions in August on a final round of fundraising before listing in Hong Kong, capitalizing on the excitement around its latest model to raise capital at a valuation of as much as $50 billion.

title: Z.AI to Use Only Chinese AI Chips at New Giant Data Center
title_cn: Z.AI将在新巨型数据中心仅使用中国AI芯片
summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a major data center that it plans to fill only with Chinese-made chips, a step forward in Beijing’s efforts to shift away from restricted Nvidia Corp. silicon for future AI development.

title: Google Expands in Miami After Its Billionaire Founders Buy Homes
title_cn: 谷歌在其亿万富翁创始人购买房屋后在迈阿密扩张
summary: Alphabet Inc., has more than quadrupled its office space in Miami this year shortly after co-founders Larry Page and Sergey Brin bought homes in the area.

title: Bessent Says US to Scrutinize Chinese AI Models for IP Theft
title_cn: Bessent 称美国将审查中国人工智能模型是否盗窃知识产权
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US will carefully examine open source artificial intelligence models from China for signs of intellectual property theft, amid concerns that a new wave of lower-cost Chinese competitors may sweep aside the top American models.

title: Tesla’s Problem Is Opposite of Big Tech: Not Enough AI Spending
title_cn: 特斯拉的问题与大型科技公司相反：人工智能支出不足
summary: After hearing Tesla Inc.’s seemingly countless promises about artificial intelligence, autonomous driving and robotics, Wall Street wants the company to start putting its money where its mouth is.

title: $100 Million Bet on Venezuelan Fintech Cashea Draws Global Investors
title_cn: 委内瑞拉金融科技 Cashea 投资 1 亿美元吸引全球投资者
summary: Cashea, Venezuela’s largest financial technology company, has raised $100 million across two financing rounds, as global investors bet it can grow in a market where lending has been constrained for years.

title: Amazon E-Commerce Portal for Business Nears $60 Billion in Sales
title_cn: 亚马逊企业电子商务门户销售额接近 600 亿美元
summary: Amazon.com Inc.’s business sales unit was recently on track to sell $60 billion of merchandise over the course of a full year, up about 71% from 2023, evidence that the world’s largest online retailer is gaining ground in corporate sales.

title: OpenAI’s Agents Reach 10 Million Users After ChatGPT Work Debut
title_cn: ChatGPT 上线后 OpenAI 代理已覆盖 1000 万用户
summary: OpenAI has seen a sharp uptick in demand for its artificial intelligence agents since its recent release of ChatGPT Work, providing new momentum in its bid to keep pace with rival Anthropic PBC.

title: Garmin Debuts $200 Screenless Fitness Band in Challenge to Whoop
title_cn: Garmin 推出售价 200 美元的无屏健身手环，挑战 Whoop
summary: Garmin Ltd. introduced a $200 screenless fitness tracker, becoming the latest company to enter a segment popularized by Whoop Inc.

title: Samsung Debuts AI-Powered Health Assistant, Joining Packed Market
title_cn: 三星推出人工智能健康助手，加入拥挤的市场
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. is rolling out a new AI-powered assistant that acts as a virtual health companion, joining a growing number of tech companies using chatbots to deliver personalized wellness insights to its users.Samsung Health Assistant pulls in data from the user’s Galaxy smartphone, smartwatch or smart ring, the company said Tuesday. The firm also announced a series of other features coming to its health platform, particularly around heart metrics.

title: China’s World AI Conference and TSMC’s Arizona Investment Mark Wins for Leaders
title_cn: 中国世界人工智能大会和台积电亚利桑那投资马克赢得领导者奖
summary: As China convenes a global AI conference, Arizona receives more investment

title: BlackRock-MGX Consortium Eyes $5 Billion Aligned Data Centers Expansion
title_cn: BlackRock-MGX 联盟计划耗资 50 亿美元进行数据中心扩建
summary: A consortium including BlackRock Inc.’s Global Infrastructure Partners and Abu Dhabi’s MGX plans to invest an additional $5 billion to boost growth at Aligned Data Centers.

title: Data Centers on Track to Suck Up a Fifth of US Power Use by 2035
title_cn: 到 2035 年，数据中心有望吸收美国五分之一的用电量
summary: Data centers in the US will account for about 20% of the nation’s electricity consumption in 2035, up from 5.9% today, according to BloombergNEF.

title: Dating Apps Face Scam Challenge of AI-Powered ‘Chatfishing’
title_cn: 约会应用程序面临人工智能驱动的“聊天钓鱼”诈骗挑战
summary: Dating-app companies won’t touch the problem, or don’t know how.

title: Burnham Appoints First AI Minister to Cabinet in Tech Reshuffle
title_cn: 伯纳姆在技术洗牌中任命首位人工智能部长进入内阁
summary: Britain’s new Prime Minister Andy Burnham has appointed Kanishka Narayan as minister for artificial intelligence, making the post a cabinet-level position for the first time.

title: Won Daily Trading Volume Jumps on Extended Hours, Stock Selloff
title_cn: 韩元每日交易量因延长交易时间而猛增，股票抛售
summary: Daily trading volume in the South Korean won has picked up since 24-hour trading began two weeks ago, a trend driven by foreigners offloading local chipmakers’ shares.

title: New Jersey Says Software Error Registered 6,600 Noncitizens
title_cn: 新泽西州称软件错误登记了 6,600 名非公民
summary: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill said about 6,600 people who identified themselves as noncitizens were registered to vote between June 2023 and June 2024 due to a software error in the state’s motor vehicle system.

title: Israel Withdraws Troops From Lebanon Towns in Test of Truce
title_cn: 以色列从黎巴嫩城镇撤军以测试停战
summary: Israeli troops have withdrawn from parts of southern Lebanon under a US-mediated ceasefire agreement, which aims to keep Iran-backed Hezbollah away from the Israeli border and end nearly five months of conflict.

title: Canadian Provinces Defy Trump’s Tariff Threat, Keep US Alcohol Bans
title_cn: 加拿大各省无视特朗普的关税威胁，保留美国的酒精禁令
summary: President Donald Trump’s administration is using another tariff threat to put fresh pressure on Canadian provinces to end their boycotts of US alcohol. But provincial leaders aren’t backing off.

title: Trump Pauses $1 Billion in Medicaid Funds From Two States
title_cn: 特朗普暂停向两个州提供 10 亿美元医疗补助资金
summary: The Trump administration will withhold more than $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California and Minnesota after an audit indicated instances of fraud in the federal health program.

title: Cutting UK’s High Marginal Taxes Pays for Itself, OBR Chief Says
title_cn: OBR 负责人表示，削减英国高边际税收是值得的
summary: New UK Chancellor of the Exchequer John Healey can cut taxes and strengthen the public finances by tackling distortions in the tax system, the budget watchdog’s top economist said.

title: Thames Water Creditors Pitch Golden Share for UK Government
title_cn: 泰晤士水务债权人为英国政府提供黄金份额
summary: Thames Water’s senior creditors are proposing to give the UK government more control over the utility in a bid to avert any move by new Prime Minister Andy Burnham to nationalize the firm.

title: Nicaraguan Leader Slammed by Washington After Ending Elections
title_cn: 尼加拉瓜领导人在选举结束后遭到华盛顿猛烈抨击
summary: Nicaraguan President Daniel Ortega drew sharp criticism from Washington after saying the country would no longer hold elections, cementing the family dictatorship he has spent decades building.

title: Trump Plays Down Prospects for Iran Talks Amid Red Sea Threat
title_cn: 特朗普在红海威胁中淡化伊朗谈判的前景
summary: US President Donald Trump minimized the prospect of immediate talks with Iran as the two sides exchanged strikes and Houthi militants in Yemen threatened shipping in the Red Sea.

title: Carney, Trump Agree to Speed Up Trade Talks Before 50% Tariffs Hit
title_cn: 卡尼和特朗普同意在关税达到 50% 之前加快贸易谈判
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said he and US President Donald Trump agreed to accelerate trade talks ahead of a potential US move to impose 50% tariffs on a range of Canadian goods next month.

title: Trump Minimizes Chance of China Punishment Over Election Claims
title_cn: 特朗普将中国因选举主张而受到惩罚的可能性降到最低
summary: President Donald Trump downplayed the likelihood he would order retaliation against China over his unfounded allegations that Beijing illegally compromised American election data.

title: Streeting Predicts UK Defense Spending Uplift Under Burnham
title_cn: 斯特里廷预测伯纳姆领导下的英国国防开支将增加
summary: Britain’s new Defence Secretary Wes Streeting used his first public remarks on Tuesday to hint that military spending will rise more rapidly under Andy Burnham, as he stoked expectations that the new administration is preparing to increase funding for defense.

title: US Allies in Persian Gulf Exasperated as Iran War Escalates
title_cn: 伊朗战争升级，美国在波斯湾的盟友感到愤怒
summary: Washington’s Gulf Arab allies are increasingly frustrated as hostilities between the US and Iran intensify, jeopardizing their national security and economies.

title: Merz Gets Chance to Reset Chancellorship After Ally Quits
title_cn: 艾利辞职后默茨有机会重置总理职位
summary: The 48-hour firestorm that took down one of German Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s key parliamentary allies has given him a window to tighten his grip on the policymaking apparatus.

title: DOJ Can Give Biden Tapes to Conservative Group, Court Says
title_cn: 法院称，司法部可以将拜登录音带交给保守派团体
summary: A federal appeals court cleared the way for a conservative group to obtain copies of interviews Joe Biden privately recorded years ago for his memoir, denying the former president’s request for a temporary block.

title: Modi’s Rivals Removed by Police as Student Protests Escalate
title_cn: 随着学生抗议升级，莫迪的竞争对手被警方驱逐
summary: Indian opposition leader Rahul Gandhi was forcibly removed by the police during a protest outside Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s official home on Tuesday, escalating tensions a day after massive student-led demonstrations.

title: Trump's Corporate Pardon Power Echoes a 17th Century English King
title_cn: 特朗普的企业赦免权与 17 世纪英国国王相呼应
summary: The president is the first in modern US history to issue clemency to businesses, with nine so far in his second term.

title: US Offers to Halve Aluminum Duties for Firms Building in US
title_cn: 美国提议将在美建设企业的铝关税减半
summary: The Trump administration announced an incentive program under which companies that build, expand or refurbish aluminum plants in the US would receive a tariff discount for the metal they ship in from abroad.

title: UK Gas Price Surge Erodes PM Burnham’s Energy Bill Savings
title_cn: 英国天然气价格飙升侵蚀了首相伯纳姆节省的能源费用
summary: New UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham’s moves to reduce household energy bills are set to be undercut by a recent surge in wholesale energy prices related to the US-Iran war.

title: Hungary Prosecutors Seize Orban Party’s IT Servers in Fraud Case
title_cn: 匈牙利检察官在欺诈案中扣押欧尔班党的 IT 服务器
summary: Hungary’s state prosecutors seized computers from Viktor Orban’s political group as part of an investigation into potential fraud carried out in the run up to this April’s election in which the Fidesz party lost power.

title: Ann Widdecombe Repeatedly Hit on Head With Hammer, Prosecutors Say
title_cn: 检察官称安·维德科姆多次用锤子敲击头部
summary: A British man appeared in court for the first time accused of murdering ex-Conservative Party minister Ann Widdecombe by hitting her 21 times over the head with a hammer.
